user.title: Eloverblik
user.description: Enter your Eloverblik refresh token. If your account has access to multiple metering points, you can choose one in the next step.

select_metering_point.title: Select Metering Point
select_metering_point.description: Choose which metering point to import from Eloverblik.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Eloverblik
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new refresh token for metering point {metering_point}.

error.connection: Unable to connect to Eloverblik API.
error.no_metering_points: No metering points were found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This metering point is already configured.
